chunks.text: Page 1 of 1 ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-1389 of 2025. Cr. Bail Application No.S-1418 of 2025. DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 04.03.2026. Mr. Qurban Ali Bhutto, Advocate for Applicant / Accused (in Both Bail Appls). Mr. Khalid Hussain Lakho, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State. ***************************************** Learned counsel for the applicant/accused in both Applications submits that the learned Magistrate took cognizance of offence punishable U/s 397 PPC and case being exclusively triable by the Court of Sessions was sent up to the Sessions Judge, Matiari. He further submits that while scrutiny U/s 265-D Cr.P.C the learned Sessions Judge passed the order dated 12.01.2026, whereby returned the case to the learned Magistrate Court by observing that during commission of offence neither accused used their weapons, nor any person sustained injury and the case is triable by the Court of Judicial Magistrate for the offence punishable Under Section 392 PPC. He further submits that he would be satisfied if the directions are issued to the learned Trial Court to proceed with the matter. In view of above, the learned Magistrate is directed to record evidence of at least two material witnesses within one month and thereafter, the applicants / accused would be at liberty to file a fresh Bail Applications on the basis of evidence. Accordingly, these Bail Applications are disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE Ali.
